Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** * Results about Topology *)
(** Author: Catherine LELAY. Jan 2016 - *)
(** Based on Bourbaki *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Export UniMath.Topology.Filters.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.Groups.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.DivisionRig.
Require Import UniMath.Algebra.ConstructiveStructures.

Section Open.

Context {X : UU}.
Context (O : (X → hProp) → hProp).

Definition isSetOfOpen_union :=
  ∏ P : (X → hProp) → hProp,
    (∏ A : X → hProp, P A → O A) → O (union P).

X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isSetOfOpen_union


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isSetOfOpen_union

  apply (impred_isaprop _ (λ _, isapropimpl _ _ (propproperty _))).
Qed.
Definition isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection :=
  ∏ (P : Sequence (X → hProp)), (∏ m, O (P m)) → O (finite_intersection P).

X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection

  apply (impred_isaprop _ (λ _, isapropimpl _ _ (propproperty _))).
Qed.

Definition isSetOfOpen_htrue :=
  O (λ _, htrue).

Definition isSetOfOpen_and :=
  ∏ A B, O A → O B → O (λ x, A x ∧ B x).

X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isSetOfOpen_and


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isaprop isSetOfOpen_and

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
A: X → hProp
isaprop
  (∏ B : X → hProp, O A → O B → O (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop (O A → O B → O (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
A, B: X → hProp
isaprop (O (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  now apply propproperty.
Qed.


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_union → O (λ _ : X, hfalse)


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_union → O (λ _ : X, hfalse)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_union
O (λ _ : X, hfalse)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_union
O (union (λ _ : X → hProp, hfalse))

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_union
∏ A : X → hProp, hfalse → O A

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_union
A: X → hProp
hfalse → O A

  apply fromempty.
Qed.


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection → isSetOfOpen_htrue


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection → isSetOfOpen_htrue

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
isSetOfOpen_htrue

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
O (λ _ : X, htrue)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
O (finite_intersection nil)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, O (nil m)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
m: (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn
O (nil m)

  induction (nopathsfalsetotrue (pr2 m)).
Qed.


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection → isSetOfOpen_and


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection → isSetOfOpen_and

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: O A
Hb: O B
O (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: O A
Hb: O B
O (finite_intersection (pairSequence A B))

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: O A
Hb: O B
∏ m : (⟦ length (pairSequence A B) ⟧)%stn,
O (pairSequence A B m)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: O A
Hb: O B
m: (⟦ length (pairSequence A B) ⟧)%stn
O
  (nat_rect (λ _ : ℕ, X → hProp) A
     (λ (_ : ℕ) (_ : X → hProp), B) (pr1 m))

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
H0: isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: O A
Hb: O B
m: ℕ
Hm: m < length (pairSequence A B)
O
  (nat_rect (λ _ : ℕ, X → hProp) A
     (λ (_ : ℕ) (_ : X → hProp), B) m)

  now induction m.
Qed.

X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_htrue
→ isSetOfOpen_and → isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection


X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
isSetOfOpen_htrue
→ isSetOfOpen_and → isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isSetOfOpen_htrue
Hpair: isSetOfOpen_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
(∏ m : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L m))
→ O (finite_intersection L)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isSetOfOpen_htrue
Hpair: isSetOfOpen_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
O (λ _ : X, htrue)
× (∏ A B : X → hProp,
   O A → O B → O (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x))

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isSetOfOpen_htrue
Hpair: isSetOfOpen_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
O (λ _ : X, htrue)
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isSetOfOpen_htrue
Hpair: isSetOfOpen_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
∏ A B : X → hProp, O A → O B → O (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isSetOfOpen_htrue
Hpair: isSetOfOpen_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
O (λ _ : X, htrue)
 exact Htrue.
  
X: UU
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
Htrue: isSetOfOpen_htrue
Hpair: isSetOfOpen_and
L: Sequence (X → hProp)
∏ A B : X → hProp, O A → O B → O (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)
 exact Hpair.
Qed.

Definition isSetOfOpen :=
  isSetOfOpen_union × isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection.

End Open.

Definition isTopologicalSpace (X : hSet) :=
  ∑ O : (X → hProp) → hProp, isSetOfOpen O.
Definition TopologicalSpace := ∑ X : hSet, isTopologicalSpace X.

Definition make_TopologicalSpace (X : hSet) (O : (X → hProp) → hProp)
           (is : isSetOfOpen_union O)
           (is0 : isSetOfOpen_htrue O)
           (is1 : isSetOfOpen_and O) : TopologicalSpace :=
  (X,,O,,is,,(isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection_carac _ is0 is1)).

Definition pr1TopologicatSpace : TopologicalSpace → hSet := pr1.
Coercion pr1TopologicatSpace : TopologicalSpace >-> hSet.

Definition isOpen {T : TopologicalSpace} : (T → hProp) → hProp := pr1 (pr2 T).
Definition Open {T : TopologicalSpace} :=
  ∑ O : T → hProp, isOpen O.
Definition pr1Open {T : TopologicalSpace} : Open → (T → hProp) := pr1.
Coercion pr1Open : Open >-> Funclass.

Section Topology_pty.

Context {T : TopologicalSpace}.


T: TopologicalSpace
∏ P : (T → hProp) → hProp,
(∏ A : T → hProp, P A → isOpen A) → isOpen (union P)


T: TopologicalSpace
∏ P : (T → hProp) → hProp,
(∏ A : T → hProp, P A → isOpen A) → isOpen (union P)

  apply (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 T))).
Qed.

T: TopologicalSpace
∏ P : Sequence (T → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length P ⟧)%stn, isOpen (P m))
→ isOpen (finite_intersection P)


T: TopologicalSpace
∏ P : Sequence (T → hProp),
(∏ m : (⟦ length P ⟧)%stn, isOpen (P m))
→ isOpen (finite_intersection P)

  apply (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 T))).
Qed.


T: TopologicalSpace
isOpen (λ _ : T, hfalse)


T: TopologicalSpace
isOpen (λ _ : T, hfalse)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
isSetOfOpen_union isOpen

  
T: TopologicalSpace
P: (T → hProp) → hProp
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, P A → isOpen A
isOpen (union P)

  now apply isOpen_union.
Qed.

T: TopologicalSpace
isOpen (λ _ : T, htrue)


T: TopologicalSpace
isOpen (λ _ : T, htrue)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
isOpen (finite_intersection nil)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ m : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, isOpen (nil m)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
m: (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn
isOpen (nil m)

  induction (nopathsfalsetotrue (pr2 m)).
Qed.

T: TopologicalSpace
∏ A B : T → hProp,
isOpen A → isOpen B → isOpen (λ x : T, A x ∧ B x)


T: TopologicalSpace
∏ A B : T → hProp,
isOpen A → isOpen B → isOpen (λ x : T, A x ∧ B x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
isSetOfOpen_finite_intersection isOpen

  
T: TopologicalSpace
P: Sequence (T → hProp)
Hp: ∏ m : (⟦ length P ⟧)%stn, isOpen (P m)
isOpen (finite_intersection P)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
P: Sequence (T → hProp)
Hp: ∏ m : (⟦ length P ⟧)%stn, isOpen (P m)
∏ m : (⟦ length P ⟧)%stn, isOpen (P m)

  apply Hp.
Qed.

T: TopologicalSpace
∏ A B : T → hProp,
isOpen A → isOpen B → isOpen (λ x : T, A x ∨ B x)


T: TopologicalSpace
∏ A B : T → hProp,
isOpen A → isOpen B → isOpen (λ x : T, A x ∨ B x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
isOpen (λ x : T, A x ∨ B x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
isOpen (union (λ C : T → hProp, C = A ∨ C = B))

  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
∏ A0 : T → hProp, A0 = A ∨ A0 = B → isOpen A0

  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
C: T → hProp
C = A ∨ C = B → isOpen C

  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
C: T → hProp
(C = A) ⨿ (C = B) → isOpen C

  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
isOpen A
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
isOpen B

  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
isOpen A
 exact Ha.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: isOpen A
Hb: isOpen B
isOpen B
 exact Hb.
Qed.

End Topology_pty.

(** ** Neighborhood *)

Section Neighborhood.

Context {T : TopologicalSpace}.

Definition neighborhood (x : T) : (T → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ P : T → hProp, ∃ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y).


T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
(∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P) <-> isOpen P


T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
(∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P) <-> isOpen P

  
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
(∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P) → isOpen P
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
isOpen P → ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P

  
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
(∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P) → isOpen P
 
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
isOpen P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
isOpen P

Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)

isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)

∏ t : T, isaprop (A t → P t)

y: T
isaprop (A y → P y)

Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
A: T → hProp
y: T
isaprop (P y)

      apply propproperty. 
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
isOpen P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
Q:= λ A : T → hProp,
isOpen A ∧ make_hProp (∏ y : T, A y → P y) (H A): (T → hProp) → hProp
isOpen P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
Q:= λ A : T → hProp,
isOpen A ∧ make_hProp (∏ y : T, A y → P y) (H A): (T → hProp) → hProp
P = union Q

P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
Q:= λ A : T → hProp,
isOpen A ∧ make_hProp (∏ y : T, A y → P y) (H A): (T → hProp) → hProp

T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
Q:= λ A : T → hProp,
isOpen A ∧ make_hProp (∏ y : T, A y → P y) (H A): (T → hProp) → hProp

Px: P x
A: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
isOpen (pr1 A)
 apply (pr2 (pr1 A)).
          
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
Q:= λ A : T → hProp,
isOpen A ∧ make_hProp (∏ y : T, A y → P y) (H A): (T → hProp) → hProp
x: T
Px: P x
A: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
make_hProp (∏ y : T, pr1 A y → P y) (H (pr1 A))
 exact (pr2 (pr2 A)).
        
T: TopologicalSpace
P: T → hProp
Hp: ∏ x : T, P x → neighborhood x P
H: ∏ A : T → hProp, isaprop (∏ y : T, A y → P y)
Q:= λ A : T → hProp,
isOpen A ∧ make_hProp (∏ y : T, A y → P y) (H A): (T → hProp) → hProp
x: T
Px: P x
A: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
pr1 A x
 exact (pr1 (pr2 A)).
      
T: TopologicalSpace

x: T
union Q x → P x

 isOpen_and (pr11 Oa) (pr11 Ob) (pr21 Oa) (pr21 Ob)) x
× (∏ y : T,
   ((λ x : T, pr1 Oa x ∧ pr1 Ob x),,
    isOpen_and (pr11 Oa) (pr11 Ob) (pr21 Oa) (pr21 Ob))

T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
(T → hProp) → hProp
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_imply ?F
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_htrue ?F
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_and ?F
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T

T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
(T → hProp) → hProp
 apply (neighborhood x).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_imply (neighborhood x)
 abstract (intros A B ;
              apply neighborhood_imply).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_htrue (neighborhood x)
 abstract (apply (pr2 (neighborhood_isOpen _)) ;
              [ apply isOpen_htrue |
                apply tt]).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_and (neighborhood x)
 abstract (intros A B ;
              apply neighborhood_and).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_notempty (neighborhood x)
 abstract (intros A Ha ;
              apply hinhpr ;
              exists x ;
              now apply neighborhood_point in Ha).
Defined.

(** ** Base of Neighborhood *)

Definition is_base_of_neighborhood {T : TopologicalSpace} (x : T) (B : (T → hProp) → hProp) :=
  (∏ P : T → hProp, B P → neighborhood x P)
    × (∏ P : T → hProp, neighborhood x P → ∃ Q : T → hProp, B Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)).

Definition base_of_neighborhood {T : TopologicalSpace} (x : T) :=
  ∑ (B : (T → hProp) → hProp), is_base_of_neighborhood x B.
Definition pr1base_of_neighborhood {T : TopologicalSpace} (x : T) :
  base_of_neighborhood x → ((T → hProp) → hProp) := pr1.
Coercion pr1base_of_neighborhood : base_of_neighborhood >-> Funclass.

Section base_default.

Context {T : TopologicalSpace} (x : T).

Definition base_default : (T → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ P : T → hProp, isOpen P ∧ P x.


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
∏ P : T → hProp, base_default P → neighborhood x P

P: T → hProp

P: T → hProp

∏ y : T, (P,, pr1 Hp) y → P y

(P,, pr1 Hp) x
 exact (pr2 Hp).

∏ y : T, (P,, pr1 Hp) y → P y
 
T: TopologicalSpace

y: T
X: (P,, pr1 Hp) y
P y
 assumption.
Qed.

T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
∏ P : T → hProp,
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  base_default Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
∏ P : T → hProp,
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  base_default Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  base_default Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
(∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y))
→ ∑ Q : T → hProp,
  base_default Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
∑ Q : T → hProp, base_default Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
base_default (pr1 Q) × (∏ t : T, pr1 Q t → P t)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
isOpen (pr1 Q)
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
pr1 Q x
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
∏ t : T, pr1 Q t → P t

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
isOpen (pr1 Q)
 exact (pr2 (pr1 Q)).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
pr1 Q x
 exact (pr1 (pr2 Q)).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
Q: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → P y)
∏ t : T, pr1 Q t → P t
 exact (pr2 (pr2 Q)).
Qed.

End base_default.


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base_of_neighborhood x


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base_of_neighborhood x

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
is_base_of_neighborhood x (base_default x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
∏ P : T → hProp, base_default x P → neighborhood x P
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
∏ P : T → hProp,
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  base_default x Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
∏ P : T → hProp, base_default x P → neighborhood x P
 now apply base_default_1.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
∏ P : T → hProp,
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  base_default x Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)
 now apply base_default_2.
Defined.

Definition neighborhood' {T : TopologicalSpace} (x : T) (B : base_of_neighborhood x) : (T → hProp) → hProp :=
  λ P : T → hProp, ∃ O : T → hProp, B O × (∏ t : T, O t → P t).


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
∏ P : T → hProp,
neighborhood' x B P <-> neighborhood x P


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
∏ P : T → hProp,
neighborhood' x B P <-> neighborhood x P

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
neighborhood' x B P → neighborhood x P
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
neighborhood x P → neighborhood' x B P

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
neighborhood' x B P → neighborhood x P
 
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
(∑ O : T → hProp, B O × (∏ t : T, O t → P t))
→ neighborhood x P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
O: ∑ O : T → hProp, B O × (∏ t : T, O t → P t)
neighborhood x P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
O: ∑ O : T → hProp, B O × (∏ t : T, O t → P t)
neighborhood x (pr1 O) → neighborhood x P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
O: ∑ O : T → hProp, B O × (∏ t : T, O t → P t)
∏ y : T, pr1 O y → P y

    exact (pr2 (pr2 O)).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
neighborhood x P → neighborhood' x B P
 
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
Hp: neighborhood x P
neighborhood' x B P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
Hp: neighborhood x P
(∃ Q : T → hProp, pr1 B Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t))
→ neighborhood' x B P

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
Hp: neighborhood x P
(∑ Q : T → hProp, pr1 B Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t))
→ ∑ O : T → hProp, B O × (∏ t : T, O t → P t)

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
Hp: neighborhood x P
O: ∑ Q : T → hProp, pr1 B Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)
∑ O : T → hProp, B O × (∏ t : T, O t → P t)

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
B: base_of_neighborhood x
P: T → hProp
Hp: neighborhood x P
O: ∑ Q : T → hProp, pr1 B Q × (∏ t : T, Q t → P t)
B (pr1 O) × (∏ t : T, pr1 O t → P t)

    exact (pr2 O).
Qed.

(** ** Some topologies *)

(** *** Topology from neighborhood *)

Definition isNeighborhood {X : UU} (B : X → (X → hProp) → hProp) :=
  (∏ x, isfilter_imply (B x))
    × (∏ x, isfilter_htrue (B x))
    × (∏ x, isfilter_and (B x))
    × (∏ x P, B x P → P x)
    × (∏ x P, B x P → ∃ Q, B x Q × ∏ y, Q y → B y P).


T: TopologicalSpace
isNeighborhood neighborhood


T: TopologicalSpace
isNeighborhood neighborhood

  
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : T, isfilter_imply (neighborhood x)
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : T, isfilter_htrue (neighborhood x)
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : T, isfilter_and (neighborhood x)
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : T) (P : T → hProp), neighborhood x P → P x
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : T) (P : T → hProp),
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  neighborhood x Q × (∏ y : T, Q y → neighborhood y P)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : T, isfilter_imply (neighborhood x)
 
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
A, B: T → hProp
(∏ x : T, A x → B x)
→ neighborhood x A → neighborhood x B

    apply (neighborhood_imply x).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : T, isfilter_htrue (neighborhood x)
 
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isfilter_htrue (neighborhood x)

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isOpen (λ _ : T, htrue)
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
htrue

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
isOpen (λ _ : T, htrue)
 exact (isOpen_htrue (T := T)).
    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
htrue
 apply tt.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : T, isfilter_and (neighborhood x)
 
T: TopologicalSpace
A: T
B: T → hProp
∏ B0 : T → hProp,
neighborhood A B
→ neighborhood A B0
  → neighborhood A (λ x : T, B x ∧ B0 x)

    apply neighborhood_and.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : T) (P : T → hProp), neighborhood x P → P x
 
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
neighborhood x P → P x

    apply neighborhood_point.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : T) (P : T → hProp),
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  neighborhood x Q × (∏ y : T, Q y → neighborhood y P)
 
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
P: T → hProp
neighborhood x P
→ ∃ Q : T → hProp,
  neighborhood x Q × (∏ y : T, Q y → neighborhood y P)

    apply neighborhood_neighborhood.
Qed.

Section TopologyFromNeighborhood.

Context {X : hSet}.
Context (N : X → (X → hProp) → hProp).
Context (Himpl : ∏ x, isfilter_imply (N x))
        (Htrue : ∏ x, isfilter_htrue (N x))
        (Hand : ∏ x, isfilter_and (N x))
        (Hpt : ∏ x P, N x P → P x)
        (H : ∏ x P, N x P → ∃ Q, N x Q × ∏ y, Q y → N y P).

Definition topologyfromneighborhood (A : X → hProp) :=
  ∏ x : X, A x → N x A.

X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
∏ A : X → hProp, isaprop (topologyfromneighborhood A)


X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
∏ A : X → hProp, isaprop (topologyfromneighborhood A)

  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
A: X → hProp
isaprop (topologyfromneighborhood A)

  apply impred_isaprop ; intros x ;
  apply isapropimpl, propproperty.
Qed.


X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
isSetOfOpen_union
  (λ A : X → hProp,
   make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
     (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A))


X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
isSetOfOpen_union
  (λ A : X → hProp,
   make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
     (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A))

  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
union L x → N x (union L)

  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
(∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x) → N x (union L)

  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
N x (union L)

  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x

N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
∏ x : X, pr1 A x → union L x
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)

Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x

N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)

Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)

N x (pr1 A)

  
X: hSet

→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)

L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)

A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
∏ x : X, pr1 A x → union L x
 
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x

N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)

Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
y: X
Hy: pr1 A y
union L y

    
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x

N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)

L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
y: X
Hy: pr1 A y
∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A y

    now exists (pr1 A), (pr1 (pr2 A)).
  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
N x (pr1 A)
 
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
L (pr1 A)
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
pr1 A x

    
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
L (pr1 A)
 exact (pr1 (pr2 A)).
    
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
Himpl: ∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)
Htrue: ∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (N x)
Hand: ∏ x : X, isfilter_and (N x)
Hpt: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp), N x P → P x
H: ∏ (x : X) (P : X → hProp),
N x P
→ ∃ Q : X → hProp, N x Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
L: (X → hProp) → hProp
Hl: ∏ A : X → hProp,
L A
→ make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood A)
    (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood A)
x: X
A: ∑ A : X → hProp, L A × A x
pr1 A x
 exact (pr2 (pr2 A)).
Qed.

End TopologyFromNeighborhood.


X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
TopologicalSpace

(?X → hProp) → hProp

X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
A: X → hProp
isaprop (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
 apply isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood.
  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
isSetOfOpen_union
  (λ A : X → hProp,
   make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
     (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N A))
 
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (N x)

    apply (pr1 H).
  
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
isSetOfOpen_htrue
  (λ A : X → hProp,
   make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
     (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N A))

H: isNeighborhood N
x: X
N x (λ _ : X, htrue)

    apply (pr1 (pr2 H)).

N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp

  (λ A : X → hProp,
   make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)

X: hSet

H: isNeighborhood N
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N A)
Hb: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N B)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N B)
x: X
Hx: A x ∧ B x
N x (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

    
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N A)
Hb: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N B)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N B)

N x A
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N A)
Hb: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N B)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N B)
x: X
Hx: A x ∧ B x
N x B

    
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N A)
Hb: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N B)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N B)
x: X
Hx: A x ∧ B x
N x A
 now apply Ha, (pr1 Hx).
    
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
A, B: X → hProp
Ha: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N A)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N A)
Hb: make_hProp (topologyfromneighborhood N B)
  (isaprop_topologyfromneighborhood N B)
x: X
Hx: A x ∧ B x
N x B
 now apply Hb, (pr2 Hx).
Defined.

X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
x: X
P: X → hProp
Hx: N x P
y: X
Hy: N y P
Q: ∑ Q : X → hProp, N y Q × (∏ y : X, Q y → N y P)
∏ x : X, pr1 Q x → N x P

        exact (pr2 (pr2 Q)).
    
X: hSet
N: X → (X → hProp) → hProp
H: isNeighborhood N
x: X
P: X → hProp
Hx: N x P
(λ O : Open,
 O x × (∏ y : TopologyFromNeighborhood N H, O y → P y))
  ((λ y : TopologyFromNeighborhood N H, N y P),,
   (((λ (y : X) (Hy : N y P),
      hinhuniv
        (λ Q : ∑ Q : X → hProp,
               N y Q × (∏ y0 : X, Q y0 → N y0 P),
         pr1 H y (pr1 Q) (λ y0 : X, N y0 P) (pr22 Q)
           (pr12 Q)) ((pr222 (pr2 H)) y P Hy))
     :
     topologyfromneighborhood N (λ y : X, N y P))
    :
    (λ O : TopologyFromNeighborhood N H → hProp,
     isOpen O)
      (λ y : TopologyFromNeighborhood N H, N y P)))

(** *** Generated Topology *)

Section topologygenerated.

Context {X : hSet} (O : (X → hProp) → hProp).

Definition topologygenerated :=
  λ (x : X) (A : X → hProp),
  (∃ L : Sequence (X → hProp), (∏ n, O (L n)) × (finite_intersection L x) × (∏ y, finite_intersection L y → A y)).


X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (topologygenerated x)


X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
∏ x : X, isfilter_imply (topologygenerated x)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
topologygenerated x A → topologygenerated x B

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
(∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
 (∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
 × finite_intersection L x
   × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y))
→ ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
  (∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
  × finite_intersection L x
    × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
(∏ n : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn, O (pr1 L n))
× finite_intersection (pr1 L) x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection (pr1 L) y → B y)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
∏ n : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn, O (pr1 L n)
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
finite_intersection (pr1 L) x
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
∏ y : X, finite_intersection (pr1 L) y → B y

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
∏ n : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn, O (pr1 L n)
 exact (pr1 (pr2 L)).
  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
finite_intersection (pr1 L) x
 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 L))).
  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
∏ y : X, finite_intersection (pr1 L) y → B y
 
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
H: ∏ x : X, A x → B x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
y: X
Hy: finite_intersection (pr1 L) y
B y

    apply H, (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 L))), Hy.
Qed.


X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (topologygenerated x)

∏ x : X, isfilter_htrue (topologygenerated x)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
isfilter_htrue (topologygenerated x)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → htrue)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
(∏ n : (⟦ length nil ⟧)%stn, O (nil n))
× finite_intersection nil x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection nil y → htrue)

  repeat split; intros n; induction (nopathsfalsetotrue (pr2 n)).
Qed.


X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
∏ x : X, isfilter_and (topologygenerated x)


X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
∏ x : X, isfilter_and (topologygenerated x)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
topologygenerated x A
→ topologygenerated x B
  → topologygenerated x (λ x : X, A x ∧ B x)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
(∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
 (∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
 × finite_intersection L x
   × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y))
→ (∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
   (∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
   × finite_intersection L x
     × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y))
  → ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
    (∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
    × finite_intersection L x
      × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y ∧ B y)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
La: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
Lb: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)
∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y ∧ B y)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
La: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
Lb: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)
(∏
 n : (⟦ length (concatenate (pr1 La) (pr1 Lb)) ⟧)%stn,
 O (concatenate (pr1 La) (pr1 Lb) n))
× finite_intersection (concatenate (pr1 La) (pr1 Lb))
    x
  × (∏ y : X,
     finite_intersection
       (concatenate (pr1 La) (pr1 Lb)) y → A y ∧ B y)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
La: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
Lb: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)
∏
n : (⟦ length (concatenate (pr1 La) (pr1 Lb)) ⟧)%stn,
O (concatenate (pr1 La) (pr1 Lb) n)

n : (⟦ length (pr1 La) + length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn,
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ length (pr1 La) ⟧)%stn
         ⨿ (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn, X → hProp)
  (λ j : (⟦ length (pr1 La) ⟧)%stn, pr1 La j)

     (length (pr1 Lb)) n) y

  (λ _ : (⟦ length (pr1 La) ⟧)%stn

    now rewrite (weqfromcoprodofstn_eq1 _ _) , coprod_rect_compute_1 in X0.

(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)
y: X
X0: ∏
n : (⟦ length (pr1 La) + length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn,
concatenate' (pr1 La) (pr1 Lb) n y
n: (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn
pr1 Lb n y

    
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
La: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
Lb: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)
y: X
X0: ∏
n : (⟦ length (pr1 La) + length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn,
coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ length (pr1 La) ⟧)%stn
         ⨿ (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn, X → hProp)
  (λ j : (⟦ length (pr1 La) ⟧)%stn, pr1 La j)
  (λ k : (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Lb k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap (length (pr1 La))
     (length (pr1 Lb)) n) y
n: (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn
pr1 Lb n y

    
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
x: X
A, B: X → hProp
La: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → A y)
Lb: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → B y)
y: X
n: (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn
X0: coprod_rect
  (λ _ : (⟦ length (pr1 La) ⟧)%stn
         ⨿ (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn, X → hProp)
  (λ j : (⟦ length (pr1 La) ⟧)%stn, pr1 La j)
  (λ k : (⟦ length (pr1 Lb) ⟧)%stn, pr1 Lb k)
  (weqfromcoprodofstn_invmap (length (pr1 La))
     (length (pr1 Lb))
     (weqfromcoprodofstn_map (length (pr1 La))
        (length (pr1 Lb)) (inr n))) y
pr1 Lb n y

    now rewrite (weqfromcoprodofstn_eq1 _ _), coprod_rect_compute_2 in X0.
Qed.

T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : X,, T, O y → P y)

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
Open
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
(λ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : X,, T, O y → P y)) ?pr1

  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x

(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)

X,, T → hProp

x: X,, T

(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
(λ O : X,, T → hProp, isOpen O) ?pr1

    
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
X,, T → hProp
 apply (finite_intersection (pr1 L)).
    
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P

x: X,, T
Px: P x

× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
(λ O : X,, T → hProp, isOpen O)
  (finite_intersection (pr1 L))

T: isTopologicalSpace X

Px: P x

(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
∏ m : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn, isOpen (pr1 L m)

      
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
m: (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn
isOpen (pr1 L m)

      
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
m: (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn
O (pr1 L m)

      apply (pr1 (pr2 L)).
  
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
(λ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : X,, T, O y → P y))
  (finite_intersection (pr1 L),,
   isOpen_finite_intersection (pr1 L)
     (λ m : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn,
      Ht (pr1 L m) ((pr12 L) m)))
 
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
(finite_intersection (pr1 L),,
 isOpen_finite_intersection (pr1 L)
   (λ m : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn,
    Ht (pr1 L m) ((pr12 L) m))) x
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
∏ y : X,, T,
(finite_intersection (pr1 L),,
 isOpen_finite_intersection (pr1 L)
   (λ m : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn,
    Ht (pr1 L m) ((pr12 L) m))) y → P y

    
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
(finite_intersection (pr1 L),,
 isOpen_finite_intersection (pr1 L)
   (λ m : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn,
    Ht (pr1 L m) ((pr12 L) m))) x
 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 L))).
    
X: hSet
O: (X → hProp) → hProp
T: isTopologicalSpace X
Ht: ∏ P : X → hProp, O P → pr1 T P
P: X → hProp
x: X,, T
Px: P x
L: ∑ L : Sequence (X → hProp),
(∏ n : (⟦ length L ⟧)%stn, O (L n))
× finite_intersection L x
  × (∏ y : X, finite_intersection L y → P y)
∏ y : X,, T,
(finite_intersection (pr1 L),,
 isOpen_finite_intersection (pr1 L)
   (λ m : (⟦ length (pr1 L) ⟧)%stn,
    Ht (pr1 L m) ((pr12 L) m))) y → P y
 exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 L))).
Qed.

(** *** Product of topologies *)

Section topologydirprod.

Context (U V : TopologicalSpace).

Definition topologydirprod :=
  λ (z : U × V) (A : U × V → hProp),
  (∃ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
      (Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
        × (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
        × (∏ x y, Ax x → Ay y → A (x,,y))).


U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : U × V, isfilter_imply (topologydirprod x)


U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : U × V, isfilter_imply (topologydirprod x)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
topologydirprod x A → topologydirprod x B

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
(∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
 (Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
 × (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
   × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)))
→ ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
  (Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
  × (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
    × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
pr1 AB (pr1 x) × isOpen (pr1 AB)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
(pr12 AB) (pr2 x) × isOpen (pr12 AB)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
∏ (x : U) (y : V), pr1 AB x → (pr12 AB) y → B (x,, y)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
pr1 AB (pr1 x) × isOpen (pr1 AB)
 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 AB))).
  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
(pr12 AB) (pr2 x) × isOpen (pr12 AB)
 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 AB)))).
  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
∏ (x : U) (y : V), pr1 AB x → (pr12 AB) y → B (x,, y)
 
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
H: ∏ x : U × V, A x → B x
AB: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 x) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 x) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
x': U
y': V
Hx': pr1 AB x'
Hy': (pr12 AB) y'
B (x',, y')

    now apply H, (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 AB)))).
Qed.


U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : U × V, isfilter_htrue (topologydirprod x)


U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : U × V, isfilter_htrue (topologydirprod x)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
isfilter_htrue (topologydirprod z)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → htrue)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
(htrue × isOpen (λ _ : U, htrue))
× (htrue × isOpen (λ _ : V, htrue))
  × (U → V → htrue → htrue → htrue)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
isOpen (λ _ : U, htrue)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
isOpen (λ _ : V, htrue)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
isOpen (λ _ : U, htrue)
 apply isOpen_htrue.
  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
isOpen (λ _ : V, htrue)
 apply isOpen_htrue.
Qed.


U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : U × V, isfilter_and (topologydirprod x)


U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : U × V, isfilter_and (topologydirprod x)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
topologydirprod z A
→ topologydirprod z B
  → topologydirprod z (λ x : U × V, A x ∧ B x)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
(∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
 (Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
 × (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
   × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)))
→ (∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
   (Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
   × (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
     × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y)))
  → ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
    (Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
    × (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
      × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
         Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y) ∧ B (x,, y))

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y) ∧ B (x,, y))

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
((pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ pr1 B' (pr1 z))
 × isOpen (λ x : U, pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x))
× (((pr12 A') (pr2 z) ∧ (pr12 B') (pr2 z))
   × isOpen (λ y : V, (pr12 A') y ∧ (pr12 B') y))
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x
     → (pr12 A') y ∧ (pr12 B') y
       → A (x,, y) ∧ B (x,, y))

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
pr1 A' (pr1 z)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
pr1 B' (pr1 z)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
isOpen (λ x : U, pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
(pr12 A') (pr2 z)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
(pr12 B') (pr2 z)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
isOpen (λ y : V, (pr12 A') y ∧ (pr12 B') y)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
x: U
y: V
X: pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x
X0: (pr12 A') y ∧ (pr12 B') y
A (x,, y)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
x: U
y: V
X: pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x
X0: (pr12 A') y ∧ (pr12 B') y
B (x,, y)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
pr1 A' (pr1 z)
 apply (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 A')))).
  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
pr1 B' (pr1 z)
 apply (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 B')))).

z: U × V

A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),

× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
isOpen (λ x : U, pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)

U, V: TopologicalSpace

A, B: U × V → hProp

U, V: TopologicalSpace
z: U × V
A, B: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y))
B': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → B (x,, y))
x: U
y: V
X: pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x
X0: (pr12 A') y ∧ (pr12 B') y
(pr12 B') y

Qed.

∏ (x : U × V) (P : U × V → hProp),
topologydirprod x P → P x

∏ (x : U × V) (P : U × V → hProp),
topologydirprod x P → P x

topologydirprod xy A → A xy

xy: U × V

(∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),

   × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → A (x,, y)))
→ A xy

xy: U × V

U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V

U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
A: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),

 exact (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A'))))).
Qed.

topologydirprod x P
→ ∃ Q : U × V → hProp,
  topologydirprod x Q
  × (∏ y : U × V, Q y → topologydirprod y P)

topologydirprod x P
→ ∃ Q : U × V → hProp,
  topologydirprod x Q
  × (∏ y : U × V, Q y → topologydirprod y P)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
topologydirprod xy P
→ ∃ Q : U × V → hProp,
  topologydirprod xy Q
  × (∏ y : U × V, Q y → topologydirprod y P)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
(∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
 (Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
 × (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
   × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y)))
→ ∑ Q : U × V → hProp,
  topologydirprod xy Q
  × (∏ y : U × V, Q y → topologydirprod y P)

xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

topologydirprod xy Q
× (∏ y : U × V, Q y → topologydirprod y P)

xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

   pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z))
× (∏ y : U × V,
   pr1 A' (pr1 y) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 y)
   → topologydirprod y P)

U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x
     → Ay y
       → pr1 A' (pr1 (x,, y))
         ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 (x,, y)))

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
(pr1 A' (pr1 xy) × isOpen (pr1 A'))
× ((pr12 A') (pr2 xy) × isOpen (pr12 A'))
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     pr1 A' x
     → (pr12 A') y
       → pr1 A' (pr1 (x,, y))
         ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 (x,, y)))

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
pr1 A' (pr1 xy) × isOpen (pr1 A')
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
((pr12 A') (pr2 xy) × isOpen (pr12 A'))
× (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
   pr1 A' x
   → (pr12 A') y
     → pr1 A' (pr1 (x,, y)) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 (x,, y)))

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
pr1 A' (pr1 xy) × isOpen (pr1 A')
 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 A'))).
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
((pr12 A') (pr2 xy) × isOpen (pr12 A'))
× (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
   pr1 A' x
   → (pr12 A') y
     → pr1 A' (pr1 (x,, y)) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 (x,, y)))

xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
(pr12 A') (pr2 xy) × isOpen (pr12 A')
U, V: TopologicalSpace

P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
∏ (x : U) (y : V),
pr1 A' x
→ (pr12 A') y
  → pr1 A' (pr1 (x,, y)) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 (x,, y))

      
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
(pr12 A') (pr2 xy) × isOpen (pr12 A')
 exact (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A')))).
      
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

pr1 A' x
→ (pr12 A') y
  → pr1 A' (pr1 (x,, y)) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 (x,, y))
 
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
x': U
y': V
Ax': pr1 A' x'
Ay': (pr12 A') y'
pr1 A' (pr1 (x',, y')) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 (x',, y'))

        now split.
  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
∏ y : U × V,
pr1 A' (pr1 y) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 y)
→ topologydirprod y P
 
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V
Az: pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z)
topologydirprod z P

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace

P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V
Az: pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z)
∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 z) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 z) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V

(pr1 A' (pr1 z) × isOpen (pr1 A'))
× ((pr12 A') (pr2 z) × isOpen (pr12 A'))
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     pr1 A' x → (pr12 A') y → P (x,, y))

xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp

× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)

U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V
Az: pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z)
pr1 A' (pr1 z)
 exact (pr1 Az).
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V
Az: pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z)
isOpen (pr1 A')
 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 A')))).
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V
Az: pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z)
(pr12 A') (pr2 z)
 exact (pr2 Az).
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V
Az: pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z)
isOpen (pr12 A')
 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A'))))).
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: U × V
P: U × V → hProp
A': ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
z: U × V
Az: pr1 A' (pr1 z) ∧ (pr12 A') (pr2 z)
∏ (x : U) (y : V), pr1 A' x → (pr12 A') y → P (x,, y)
 exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A')))).
Qed.

End topologydirprod.


U, V: TopologicalSpace

hSet

?X → (?X → hProp) → hProp

isNeighborhood ?N

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
hSet
 apply (U × V)%set.
  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
(U × V)%set → ((U × V)%set → hProp) → hProp
 apply topologydirprod.
  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
isNeighborhood (topologydirprod U V)
 
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : (U × V)%set,
isfilter_imply (topologydirprod U V x)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : (U × V)%set,
isfilter_htrue (topologydirprod U V x)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : (U × V)%set,
isfilter_and (topologydirprod U V x)
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : (U × V)%set) (P : (U × V)%set → hProp),
topologydirprod U V x P → P x
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : (U × V)%set) (P : (U × V)%set → hProp),
topologydirprod U V x P
→ ∃ Q : (U × V)%set → hProp,
  topologydirprod U V x Q
  × (∏ y : (U × V)%set, Q y → topologydirprod U V y P)

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : (U × V)%set,
isfilter_imply (topologydirprod U V x)
 apply topologydirprod_imply.
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : (U × V)%set,
isfilter_htrue (topologydirprod U V x)
 apply topologydirprod_htrue.
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ x : (U × V)%set,
isfilter_and (topologydirprod U V x)
 apply topologydirprod_and.
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : (U × V)%set) (P : (U × V)%set → hProp),
topologydirprod U V x P → P x
 apply topologydirprod_point.
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
∏ (x : (U × V)%set) (P : (U × V)%set → hProp),
topologydirprod U V x P
→ ∃ Q : (U × V)%set → hProp,
  topologydirprod U V x Q
  × (∏ y : (U × V)%set, Q y → topologydirprod U V y P)
 apply topologydirprod_neighborhood.
Defined.

Definition locally2d {T S : TopologicalSpace} (x : T) (y : S) : Filter (T × S) :=
  FilterDirprod (locally x) (locally y).


T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
∏ P : T × S → hProp,
locally2d x y P <-> locally (x,, y) P


T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
∏ P : T × S → hProp,
locally2d x y P <-> locally (x,, y) P

  
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
locally2d x y P <-> locally (x,, y) P

  
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
(∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
 locally x Ax
 × locally y Ay
   × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y)))
→ locally (x,, y) P
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
(∑ O : Open,
 O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y))
→ locally2d x y P

  
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
(∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
 locally x Ax
 × locally y Ay
   × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y)))
→ locally (x,, y) P

y: S

locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
locally (x,, y) P

topologydirprod T S (x,, y) P

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp

locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
locally x (pr1 A)
→ locally y (pr12 A) → topologydirprod T S (x,, y) P

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
(∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → pr1 A y))
→ (∑ O : Open, O y × (∏ y : S, O y → (pr12 A) y))
  → ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
    (Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
    × (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
      × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
Ox: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → pr1 A y)
Oy: ∑ O : Open, O y × (∏ y : S, O y → (pr12 A) y)
∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
Ox: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → pr1 A y)
Oy: ∑ O : Open, O y × (∏ y : S, O y → (pr12 A) y)
(pr1 Ox (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen (pr1 Ox))
× (pr1 Oy (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen (pr1 Oy))
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     pr1 Ox x → pr1 Oy y → P (x,, y))

pr1 Ox (pr1 (x,, y))

T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
Ox: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → pr1 A y)
Oy: ∑ O : Open, O y × (∏ y : S, O y → (pr12 A) y)
x': T
y': S
Hx': pr1 Ox x'
Hy': pr1 Oy y'
pr1 A x'
 now apply (pr2 (pr2 Ox)).
      
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
Ox: ∑ O : Open, O x × (∏ y : T, O y → pr1 A y)
Oy: ∑ O : Open, O y × (∏ y : S, O y → (pr12 A) y)
x': T
y': S
Hx': pr1 Ox x'
Hy': pr1 Oy y'
(pr12 A) y'
 now apply (pr2 (pr2 Oy)).
  
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
(∑ O : Open,
 O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y))
→ locally2d x y P
 
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
locally2d x y P

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
topologydirprod T S (x,, y) (pr11 O) → locally2d x y P

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
(∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
 (Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
 × (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
   × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
      Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y)))
→ ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
  locally x Ax
  × locally y Ay
    × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
locally x (pr1 A)
× locally y (pr12 A)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     pr1 A x → (pr12 A) y → P (x,, y))

    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
locally x (pr1 A)
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp

O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
locally y (pr12 A)
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S

O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
∏ (x : T) (y : S), pr1 A x → (pr12 A) y → P (x,, y)

× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),

× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))

T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S

× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),

x: T
y: S

× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))

 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 A)))).

× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))

y: S

× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)

     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))

 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A))))).

x: T
y: S

× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
(pr12 A) y
 exact (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A))))).
    
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
∏ (x : T) (y : S), pr1 A x → (pr12 A) y → P (x,, y)
 
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
x': T
y': S
Ax': pr1 A x'
Ay': (pr12 A) y'
P (x',, y')

      
T, S: TopologicalSpace
x: T
y: S
P: T × S → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod T S, O y → P y)
A: ∑ (Ax : T → hProp) (Ay : S → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : T) (y : S),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
x': T
y': S
Ax': pr1 A x'
Ay': (pr12 A) y'
pr1 O (x',, y')

      now apply (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 A)))).
Qed.

(** *** Topology on a subtype *)

Section topologysubtype.

Context {T : TopologicalSpace} (dom : T → hProp).

Definition topologysubtype :=
  λ (x : ∑ x : T, dom x) (A : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp),
  ∃ B : T → hProp,
    (B (pr1 x) × isOpen B) × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y).


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : ∑ x : T, dom x,
isfilter_imply (topologysubtype x)


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : ∑ x : T, dom x,
isfilter_imply (topologysubtype x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
topologysubtype x A → topologysubtype x B

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
(∑ B : T → hProp,
 (B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
 × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y))
→ ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
  (B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
  × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
(pr1 A' (pr1 x) × isOpen (pr1 A'))
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, pr1 A' (pr1 y) → B y)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
pr1 A' (pr1 x) × isOpen (pr1 A')
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, pr1 A' (pr1 y) → B y

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
pr1 A' (pr1 x) × isOpen (pr1 A')
 exact (pr1 (pr2 A')).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, pr1 A' (pr1 y) → B y
 
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
H: ∏ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x → B x
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
Hy: pr1 A' (pr1 y)
B y

    now apply H, (pr2 (pr2 A')).
Qed.


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : ∑ x : T, dom x,
isfilter_htrue (topologysubtype x)


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : ∑ x : T, dom x,
isfilter_htrue (topologysubtype x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
isfilter_htrue (topologysubtype x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → htrue)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
(htrue × isOpen (λ _ : T, htrue))
× ((∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → htrue → htrue)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
isOpen (λ _ : T, htrue)

  now apply isOpen_htrue.
Qed.


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : ∑ x : T, dom x, isfilter_and (topologysubtype x)


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : ∑ x : T, dom x, isfilter_and (topologysubtype x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
topologysubtype x A
→ topologysubtype x B
  → topologysubtype x
      (λ x : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, A x ∧ B x)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
(∑ B : T → hProp,
 (B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
 × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y))
→ (∑ B0 : T → hProp,
   (B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
   × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y))
  → ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
    (B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
    × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → A y ∧ B y)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → A y ∧ B y)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
((pr1 A' (pr1 x) ∧ pr1 B' (pr1 x))
 × isOpen (λ x : T, pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x))
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0,
   pr1 A' (pr1 y) ∧ pr1 B' (pr1 y) → A y ∧ B y)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
pr1 A' (pr1 x)
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
pr1 B' (pr1 x)
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
isOpen (λ x : T, pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
X: pr1 A' (pr1 y) ∧ pr1 B' (pr1 y)
A y
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
X: pr1 A' (pr1 y) ∧ pr1 B' (pr1 y)
B y

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
pr1 A' (pr1 x)
 exact (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 A'))).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
pr1 B' (pr1 x)
 exact (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 B'))).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
isOpen (λ x : T, pr1 A' x ∧ pr1 B' x)
 
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
isOpen (pr1 A')
