dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
isOpen (pr1 B')

dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
isOpen (pr1 A')
 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 A'))).
    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
isOpen (pr1 B')
 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 B'))).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
X: pr1 A' (pr1 y) ∧ pr1 B' (pr1 y)
A y
 apply (pr2 (pr2 A')), (pr1 X).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A, B: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
A': ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
B': ∑ B0 : T → hProp,
(B0 (pr1 x) × isOpen B0)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B0 (pr1 y) → B y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
X: pr1 A' (pr1 y) ∧ pr1 B' (pr1 y)
B y
 apply (pr2 (pr2 B')), (pr2 X).
Qed.


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ (x : ∑ x : T, dom x)
(P : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp),
topologysubtype x P → P x


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ (x : ∑ x : T, dom x)
(P : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp),
topologysubtype x P → P x

x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
topologysubtype x A → A x

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
(∑ B : T → hProp,
 (B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
 × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)) → A x

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
A x

  apply (pr2 (pr2 B)), (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 B))).
Qed.


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ (x : ∑ x : T, dom x)
(P : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp),
topologysubtype x P
→ ∃ Q : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp,
  topologysubtype x Q
  × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, Q y → topologysubtype y P)

topologysubtype x P
→ ∃ Q : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp,
  topologysubtype x Q
  × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, Q y → topologysubtype y P)

x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
topologysubtype x A
→ ∃ Q : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp,
  topologysubtype x Q
  × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, Q y → topologysubtype y A)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
(∑ B : T → hProp,
 (B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
 × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y))
→ ∑ Q : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp,
  topologysubtype x Q
  × (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, Q y → topologysubtype y A)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
∑ Q : (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp,
topologysubtype x Q
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, Q y → topologysubtype y A)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
topologysubtype x
  (λ y : ∑ x : T, dom x, pr1 B (pr1 y))
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0,
   pr1 B (pr1 y) → topologysubtype y A)

dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x

B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)

  (λ y : ∑ x : T, dom x, pr1 B (pr1 y))

   pr1 B (pr1 y) → pr1 B (pr1 y))

× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)

X: pr1 B (pr1 y)

      assumption.

(B (pr1 y) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)

By: pr1 B (pr1 y)

× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, pr1 B (pr1 y) → A y)

× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)

By: pr1 B (pr1 y)
isOpen (pr1 B)
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
By: pr1 B (pr1 y)
∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, pr1 B (pr1 y) → A y

    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
By: pr1 B (pr1 y)
pr1 B (pr1 y)
 exact By.
    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
By: pr1 B (pr1 y)
isOpen (pr1 B)
 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 B))).
    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
x: ∑ x : T, dom x
A: (∑ x0 : T, dom x0) → hProp
B: ∑ B : T → hProp,
(B (pr1 x) × isOpen B)
× (∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, B (pr1 y) → A y)
y: ∑ x0 : T, dom x0
By: pr1 B (pr1 y)
∏ y : ∑ x0 : T, dom x0, pr1 B (pr1 y) → A y
 exact (pr2 (pr2 B)).
Qed.

End topologysubtype.


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
TopologicalSpace


T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
TopologicalSpace

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
hSet
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
?X → (?X → hProp) → hProp
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
isNeighborhood ?N

  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
hSet
 exact (carrier_subset dom).
  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
(∑ y, dom y)%subset
→ ((∑ y, dom y)%subset → hProp) → hProp
 apply topologysubtype.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
isNeighborhood (topologysubtype dom)
 
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
isfilter_imply (topologysubtype dom x)
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
isfilter_htrue (topologysubtype dom x)
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
isfilter_and (topologysubtype dom x)
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ (x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset)
(P : (∑ y, dom y)%subset → hProp),
topologysubtype dom x P → P x
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ (x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset)
(P : (∑ y, dom y)%subset → hProp),
topologysubtype dom x P
→ ∃ Q : (∑ y, dom y)%subset → hProp,
  topologysubtype dom x Q
  × (∏ y : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
     Q y → topologysubtype dom y P)

    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
isfilter_imply (topologysubtype dom x)
 apply topologysubtype_imply.
    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
isfilter_htrue (topologysubtype dom x)
 apply topologysubtype_htrue.
    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
isfilter_and (topologysubtype dom x)
 apply topologysubtype_and.
    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ (x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset)
(P : (∑ y, dom y)%subset → hProp),
topologysubtype dom x P → P x
 apply topologysubtype_point.
    
T: TopologicalSpace
dom: T → hProp
∏ (x : (∑ y, dom y)%subset)
(P : (∑ y, dom y)%subset → hProp),
topologysubtype dom x P
→ ∃ Q : (∑ y, dom y)%subset → hProp,
  topologysubtype dom x Q
  × (∏ y : (∑ y, dom y)%subset,
     Q y → topologysubtype dom y P)
 apply topologysubtype_neighborhood.
Defined.

(** ** Limits in a Topological Set *)

Section locally_base.

Context {T : TopologicalSpace} (x : T) (base : base_of_neighborhood x).


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
isfilter_imply (neighborhood' x base)


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
isfilter_imply (neighborhood' x base)

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
H: ∏ x : T, A x → B x
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
neighborhood' x base B

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
H: ∏ x : T, A x → B x
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
neighborhood x B

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
H: ∏ x : T, A x → B x
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
∏ y : T, ?P y → B y
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
H: ∏ x : T, A x → B x
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
neighborhood x ?P

  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
H: ∏ x : T, A x → B x
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
∏ y : T, ?P y → B y
 exact H.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
H: ∏ x : T, A x → B x

neighborhood x A
 
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
H: ∏ x : T, A x → B x
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
neighborhood' x ?B A

    exact Ha.
Qed.

isfilter_htrue (neighborhood' x base)

 apply isOpen_htrue.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
htrue
 apply tt.
Qed.

Hb: neighborhood' x base B

A, B: T → hProp
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
Hb: neighborhood' x base B
neighborhood x A
 eapply neighborhood_equiv, Ha.
  
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A, B: T → hProp
Ha: neighborhood' x base A
Hb: neighborhood' x base B
neighborhood x B
 eapply neighborhood_equiv, Hb.
Qed.

End locally_base.


T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
Filter T

x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
Filter T

isfilter_imply ?F

(T → hProp) → hProp
 apply (neighborhood' x base).

 apply locally_base_imply.

 apply locally_base_htrue.

T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A: T → hProp

∃ x : T, A x

    
T: TopologicalSpace

∃ x : T, A x

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T

A: T → hProp
Ha: A x
∃ x : T, A x

    
T: TopologicalSpace
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
A: T → hProp
Ha: A x
∑ x : T, A x

    now exists x.
Defined.

(** *** Limit of a filter *)

Definition is_filter_lim {T : TopologicalSpace} (F : Filter T) (x : T) :=
  filter_le F (locally x).
Definition ex_filter_lim  {T : TopologicalSpace} (F : Filter T) :=
  ∃ (x : T), is_filter_lim F x.

Definition is_filter_lim_base {T : TopologicalSpace} (F : Filter T) (x : T) base :=
  filter_le F (locally_base x base).
Definition ex_filter_lim_base  {T : TopologicalSpace} (F : Filter T) :=
  ∃ (x : T) base, is_filter_lim_base F x base.


T: TopologicalSpace
F: Filter T
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
is_filter_lim_base F x base <-> is_filter_lim F x


T: TopologicalSpace
F: Filter T
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
is_filter_lim_base F x base <-> is_filter_lim F x

F: Filter T
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
is_filter_lim_base F x base → is_filter_lim F x
T: TopologicalSpace
F: Filter T
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
is_filter_lim F x → is_filter_lim_base F x base

  
T: TopologicalSpace
F: Filter T
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
is_filter_lim_base F x base → is_filter_lim F x

x: T

F P

x: T

locally_base x base P

    exact HP.

→ ∑ x : T, is_filter_lim F x

(∑ x : T, is_filter_lim F x)
→ ∑ (x : T) (base : base_of_neighborhood x),
  is_filter_lim_base F x base

F: Filter T
x: ∑ x : T, is_filter_lim F x

is_filter_lim_base F x base

F: Filter T
x: ∑ x : T, is_filter_lim F x
is_filter_lim_base F (pr1 x)
  (base_of_neighborhood_default (pr1 x))

    
T: TopologicalSpace
F: Filter T
x: ∑ x : T, is_filter_lim F x

    exact (pr2 x).
Qed.

(** *** Limit of a function *)

Definition is_lim {X : UU} {T : TopologicalSpace} (f : X → T) (F : Filter X) (x : T) :=
  filterlim f F (locally x).

Definition ex_lim {X : UU} {T : TopologicalSpace} (f : X → T) (F : Filter X) :=
  ∃ (x : T), is_lim f F x.

Definition is_lim_base {X : UU} {T : TopologicalSpace} (f : X → T) (F : Filter X) (x : T) base :=
  filterlim f F (locally_base x base).
Definition ex_lim_base {X : UU} {T : TopologicalSpace} (f : X → T) (F : Filter X) :=
  ∃ (x : T) base, is_lim_base f F x base.


X: UU
T: TopologicalSpace
f: X → T
F: Filter X
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
is_lim_base f F x base <-> is_lim f F x

F: Filter X
x: T
base: base_of_neighborhood x
is_lim_base f F x base <-> is_lim f F x

x: T

(** *** Continuity *)

Definition continuous_at {U V : TopologicalSpace} (f : U → V) (x : U) :=
  is_lim f (locally x) (f x).

Definition continuous_on {U V : TopologicalSpace} (dom : U → hProp) (f : ∏ (x : U), dom x → V) :=
  ∏ (x : U) (Hx : dom x),
    ∃ H,
      is_lim (λ y : (∑ x : U, dom x), f (pr1 y) (pr2 y)) (FilterSubtype (locally x) dom H) (f x Hx).
Definition continuous {U V : TopologicalSpace} (f : U → V) :=
  ∏ x : U, continuous_at f x.


x, y: TopologicalSpace
f: x → y
isaprop (continuous (λ x0 : x, f x0))


x, y: TopologicalSpace
f: x → y
isaprop (continuous (λ x0 : x, f x0))

  
x, y: TopologicalSpace
f: x → y
t: x
t0: y → hProp
t1: locally (f t) t0
isaprop (PreFilterIm (λ x0 : x, f x0) (locally t) t0)

  apply propproperty.
Qed.

Definition continuous_base_at {U V : TopologicalSpace} (f : U → V) (x : U) base_x base_fx :=
  is_lim_base f (locally_base x base_x) (f x) base_fx.

(** *** Continuity for 2 variable functions *)

Definition continuous2d_at {U V W : TopologicalSpace} (f : U → V → W) (x : U) (y : V) :=
  is_lim (λ z : U × V, f (pr1 z) (pr2 z)) (FilterDirprod (locally x) (locally y)) (f x y).
Definition continuous2d {U V W : TopologicalSpace} (f : U → V → W) :=
  ∏ (x : U) (y : V), continuous2d_at f x y.

Definition continuous2d_base_at {U V W : TopologicalSpace} (f : U → V → W)
           (x : U) (y : V) base_x base_y base_fxy :=
  is_lim_base (λ z : U × V, f (pr1 z) (pr2 z))
              (FilterDirprod (locally_base x base_x) (locally_base y base_y))
              (f x y) base_fxy.

(** *** Continuity of basic functions *)


X: UU
U, V: TopologicalSpace
f: X → U
g: U → V
F: Filter X
l: U
is_lim f F l
→ continuous_at g l → is_lim (g ∘ f) F (g l)


X: UU
U, V: TopologicalSpace
f: X → U
g: U → V
F: Filter X
l: U
is_lim f F l
→ continuous_at g l → is_lim (g ∘ f) F (g l)

  apply filterlim_comp.
Qed.


X, Y, Z: TopologicalSpace
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
continuous f → continuous g → continuous (g ∘ f)


X, Y, Z: TopologicalSpace
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
continuous f → continuous g → continuous (g ∘ f)

  
X, Y, Z: TopologicalSpace
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
Hf: continuous f
Hg: continuous g
x: X
continuous_at (g ∘ f) x

g: Y → Z
Hf: continuous f
Hg: continuous g
x: X
is_lim f (locally x) (f x)
X, Y, Z: TopologicalSpace

g: Y → Z

Hg: continuous g
x: X
continuous_at g (f x)

  
X, Y, Z: TopologicalSpace
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
Hf: continuous f
Hg: continuous g
x: X
is_lim f (locally x) (f x)
 apply Hf.
  
X, Y, Z: TopologicalSpace
f: X → Y
g: Y → Z
Hf: continuous f
Hg: continuous g
x: X
continuous_at g (f x)
 apply Hg.
Qed.


X: UU
U, V, W: TopologicalSpace
f: X → U
g: X → V
h: U → V → W
F: Filter X
lf: U
lg: V
is_lim f F lf
→ is_lim g F lg
  → continuous2d_at h lf lg
    → is_lim (λ x : X, h (f x) (g x)) F (h lf lg)

U, V, W: TopologicalSpace

g: X → V
h: U → V → W
F: Filter X
lf: U
lg: V
is_lim f F lf
→ is_lim g F lg
  → continuous2d_at h lf lg
    → is_lim (λ x : X, h (f x) (g x)) F (h lf lg)

g: X → V
h: U → V → W

Hg: is_lim g F lg
continuous2d_at h lf lg
→ is_lim (λ x : X, h (f x) (g x)) F (h lf lg)

filterlim (λ x : X, f x,, g x) F
  (FilterDirprod (locally lf) (locally lg))

f: X → U
g: X → V
h: U → V → W

lf: U
lg: V

Hg: is_lim g F lg
P: (∑ _ : U, V) → hProp
FilterDirprod (locally lf) (locally lg) P
→ PreFilterIm (λ x : X, f x,, g x) F P

U, V, W: TopologicalSpace

g: X → V
h: U → V → W
F: Filter X
lf: U
lg: V

Hg: is_lim g F lg
P: (∑ _ : U, V) → hProp
(∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
 locally lf Ax
 × locally lg Ay
   × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y)))
→ PreFilterIm (λ x : X, f x,, g x) F P

Hg: is_lim g F lg
P: (∑ _ : U, V) → hProp
Hp: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
locally lf Ax
× locally lg Ay
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
PreFilterIm (λ x : X, f x,, g x) F P

  
X: UU
U, V, W: TopologicalSpace
f: X → U
g: X → V
h: U → V → W

lg: V

Hg: is_lim g F lg

locally lf Ax
× locally lg Ay
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
F (λ x : X, pr1 Hp (f x) ∧ (pr12 Hp) (g x))
→ PreFilterIm (λ x : X, f x,, g x) F P

pr1 Hp (f x) ∧ (pr12 Hp) (g x) → P (f x,, g x)

lf: U
lg: V

Hg: is_lim g F lg

locally lf Ax
× locally lg Ay
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V), Ax x → Ay y → P (x,, y))
x: X

U, V: TopologicalSpace
continuous2d (λ (x : U) (y : V), x,, y)


U, V: TopologicalSpace
continuous2d (λ (x : U) (y : V), x,, y)

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
locally (x,, y) P
→ PreFilterIm (λ z : U × V, pr1 z,, pr2 z)
    (FilterDirprod (locally x) (locally y)) P

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
(∑ O : Open,
 O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y))
→ PreFilterIm (λ z : U × V, pr1 z,, pr2 z)
    (FilterDirprod (locally x) (locally y)) P

  
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
PreFilterIm (λ z : U × V, pr1 z,, pr2 z)
  (FilterDirprod (locally x) (locally y)) P

y: V

O: ∑ O : Open,

U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
topologydirprod U V (x,, y) (pr11 O)
→ PreFilterIm (λ z : U × V, pr1 z,, pr2 z)
    (FilterDirprod (locally x) (locally y)) (pr1 O)

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
(∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
 (Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
 × (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
   × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
      Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y)))
→ ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
  locally x Ax
  × locally y Ay
    × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
       Ax x → Ay y → pr1 O (pr1 (x,, y),, pr2 (x,, y)))

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
Ho: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
locally x Ax
× locally y Ay
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → pr1 O (pr1 (x,, y),, pr2 (x,, y)))

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
Ho: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
locally x (pr1 Ho)
× locally y (pr12 Ho)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     pr1 Ho x
     → (pr12 Ho) y → pr1 O (pr1 (x,, y),, pr2 (x,, y)))

    
U, V: TopologicalSpace

y: V

O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
Ho: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
locally x (pr1 Ho)

x: U
y: V

O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
Ho: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
isOpen (pr12 Ho)
 exact (pr2 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 Ho))))).
      
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
Ho: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
(pr12 Ho) y
 exact (pr1 (pr1 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 Ho))))).
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
x: U
y: V
P: TopologyDirprod U V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open,
O (x,, y) × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O y → P y)
Ho: ∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 (x,, y)) × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → (pr11 O) (x,, y))
∏ (x : U) (y : V),
pr1 Ho x
→ (pr12 Ho) y → pr1 O (pr1 (x,, y),, pr2 (x,, y))
 exact (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 (pr2 Ho)))).
Qed.

xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: U → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr1 xy) × (∏ y : U, O y → P y)
(λ O0 : Open,
 O0 xy
 × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O0 y → (pr11 O) (pr1 y)))
  ((λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr1 xy)),,
   ((λ (xy' : (U × V)%set) (Oxy : pr1 O (pr1 xy')),
     hinhpr
       (pr1 O,,
        (λ _ : V, htrue),,
        (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
        (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
        (λ (x : U) (_ : V) (H : pr1 O x) (_ : htrue),
         H)))
    :
    (λ O : TopologyDirprod U V → hProp, isOpen O)
      (λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr1 xy))))

  hinhpr
    (pr1 O,,
     (λ _ : V, htrue),,
     (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
     (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
     (λ (x : U) (_ : V) (H : pr1 O x) (_ : htrue),
      H)))) y
(pr11 O) (pr1 y)
 assumption.
Qed.

U, V: TopologicalSpace
continuous (λ xy : U × V, pr2 xy)

continuous (λ xy : U × V, pr2 xy)

P: V → hProp
locally (pr2 xy) P
→ PreFilterIm (λ xy : U × V, pr2 xy) (locally xy) P

(∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y))
→ PreFilterIm (λ xy : U × V, pr2 xy) (locally xy) P

U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
xy': (U × V)%set
Oxy: pr1 O (pr2 xy')
topologydirprod U V xy' (λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy))

        
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
xy': (U × V)%set
Oxy: pr1 O (pr2 xy')
∑ (Ax : U → hProp) (Ay : V → hProp),
(Ax (pr1 xy') × isOpen Ax)
× (Ay (pr2 xy') × isOpen Ay)
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     Ax x → Ay y → pr1 O (pr2 (x,, y)))

        
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
xy': (U × V)%set
Oxy: pr1 O (pr2 xy')
(htrue × isOpen (λ _ : U, htrue))
× (pr1 O (pr2 xy') × isOpen (pr1 O))
  × (∏ (x : U) (y : V),
     htrue → pr1 O y → pr1 O (pr2 (x,, y)))

isOpen (λ _ : U, htrue)

 exact isOpen_htrue.

U, V: TopologicalSpace

Oxy: pr1 O (pr2 xy')
x: U
y: V
X: htrue
X0: pr1 O y
pr1 O (pr2 (x,, y))
 assumption.
    
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
(λ O0 : Open,
 O0 xy
 × (∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V, O0 y → (pr11 O) (pr2 y)))
  ((λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy)),,
   ((λ (xy' : (U × V)%set) (Oxy : pr1 O (pr2 xy')),
     hinhpr
       ((λ _ : U, htrue),,
        pr1 O,,
        (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
        (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
        (λ (_ : U) (y : V) (_ : htrue) (H : pr1 O y),
         H)))
    :
    (λ O : TopologyDirprod U V → hProp, isOpen O)
      (λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy))))
 
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
((λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy)),,
 (λ (xy' : (U × V)%set) (Oxy : pr1 O (pr2 xy')),
  hinhpr
    ((λ _ : U, htrue),,
     pr1 O,,
     (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
     (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
     (λ (_ : U) (y : V) (_ : htrue) (H : pr1 O y), H))))
  xy
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V,
((λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy)),,
 (λ (xy' : (U × V)%set) (Oxy : pr1 O (pr2 xy')),
  hinhpr
    ((λ _ : U, htrue),,
     pr1 O,,
     (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
     (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
     (λ (_ : U) (y0 : V) (_ : htrue) (H : pr1 O y0), H))))
  y → (pr11 O) (pr2 y)

      
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
((λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy)),,
 (λ (xy' : (U × V)%set) (Oxy : pr1 O (pr2 xy')),
  hinhpr
    ((λ _ : U, htrue),,
     pr1 O,,
     (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
     (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
     (λ (_ : U) (y : V) (_ : htrue) (H : pr1 O y), H))))
  xy
 exact (pr1 (pr2 O)).
      
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
∏ y : TopologyDirprod U V,
((λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy)),,
 (λ (xy' : (U × V)%set) (Oxy : pr1 O (pr2 xy')),
  hinhpr
    ((λ _ : U, htrue),,
     pr1 O,,
     (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
     (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
     (λ (_ : U) (y0 : V) (_ : htrue) (H : pr1 O y0), H))))
  y → (pr11 O) (pr2 y)
 
U, V: TopologicalSpace
xy: TopologyDirprod U V
P: V → hProp
O: ∑ O : Open, O (pr2 xy) × (∏ y : V, O y → P y)
y: TopologyDirprod U V
X: ((λ xy : U × V, pr1 O (pr2 xy)),,
 (λ (xy' : (U × V)%set) (Oxy : pr1 O (pr2 xy')),
  hinhpr
    ((λ _ : U, htrue),,
     pr1 O,,
     (tt,, isOpen_htrue),,
     (Oxy,, pr21 O),,
     (λ (_ : U) (y : V) (_ : htrue) (H : pr1 O y),
      H)))) y
(pr11 O) (pr2 y)
 assumption.
Qed.

(** ** Topology in algebraic structures *)

Definition isTopological_monoid (X : monoid) (is : isTopologicalSpace X) :=
  continuous2d (U := (pr11 X) ,, is)
               (V := (pr11 X) ,, is)
               (W := (pr11 X) ,, is)
               BinaryOperations.op.
Definition Topological_monoid :=
  ∑ (X : monoid) (is : isTopologicalSpace X), isTopological_monoid X is.

Definition isTopological_gr (X : gr) (is : isTopologicalSpace X) :=
  isTopological_monoid X is
    × continuous (U := (pr11 X) ,, is)
                 (V := (pr11 X) ,, is)
                 (grinv X).
Definition Topological_gr :=
  ∑ (X : gr) is, isTopological_gr X is.

Definition isTopological_rig (X : rig) (is : isTopologicalSpace X) :=
  isTopological_monoid (rigaddabmonoid X) is
  × isTopological_monoid (rigmultmonoid X) is.
Definition Topological_rig :=
  ∑ (X : rig) is, isTopological_rig X is.

Definition isTopological_ring (X : ring) (is : isTopologicalSpace X) :=
  isTopological_gr (ringaddabgr X) is
  × isTopological_monoid (rigmultmonoid X) is.
Definition Topological_ring :=
  ∑ (X : ring) is, isTopological_ring X is.

Definition isTopological_DivRig (X : DivRig) (is : isTopologicalSpace X) :=
  isTopological_rig (pr1 X) is
  × continuous_on (U := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                  (V := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                  (λ x : X, make_hProp (x != 0%dr) (isapropneg _)) (λ x Hx, invDivRig (x,,Hx)).
Definition Topological_DivRig :=
  ∑ (X : DivRig) is, isTopological_DivRig X is.

Definition isTopological_fld (X : fld) (is : isTopologicalSpace X) :=
  isTopological_ring (pr1 X) is
  × continuous_on (U := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                  (V := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                  (λ x : X, make_hProp (x != 0%ring) (isapropneg _))
                  fldmultinv.
Definition Topological_fld :=
  ∑ (X : fld) is, isTopological_fld X is.

Definition isTopological_ConstructiveDivisionRig
  (X : ConstructiveDivisionRig)
  (is : isTopologicalSpace X)
  := isTopological_rig X is
       × continuous_on (U := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                       (V := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                       (λ x : X, (x ≠ 0)%CDR)
                       CDRinv.

Definition Topological_ConstructiveDivisionRig :=
  ∑ (X : ConstructiveDivisionRig) is, isTopological_ConstructiveDivisionRig X is.

Definition isTopological_ConstructiveField
  (X : ConstructiveField)
  (is : isTopologicalSpace X)
  := isTopological_ring X is
       × continuous_on (U := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                       (V := (pr111 X) ,, is)
                       (λ x : X, (x ≠ 0)%CF)
                       CFinv.

Definition Topological_ConstructiveField :=
  ∑ (X : ConstructiveField) is, isTopological_ConstructiveField X is.
